title: Regex recompiled on every match call
description: evaluator.rs:407-419: str_matches_regex_pat compiles a new fancy_regex::Regex on every call. The comment at line 409 acknowledges this. For a script evaluating 1000 messages, each with a :regex header test, this compiles the same pattern 1000 times. Patterns are known at compile() time — they should be compiled once and stored in CompiledScript. This is the dominant cost for any script using :regex or :matches.
